title: Identity State Machine (Deterministic Transition Model)
description: Defines the deterministic lifecycle state transition graph for CIR identity_state. This schema is strictly declarative and MUST NOT implement policy logic, trust evaluation, federation-aware decisioning, or enforcement behavior.

states.description: Complete closed set of valid identity lifecycle states in the CIR model. This set MUST be exhaustive and MAY NOT be extended implicitly by external systems.

transitions.description: Deterministic allowed transitions between identity states. This is a closed graph definition and MUST be treated as fully authoritative for transition validity only (not execution control).

trigger.description: Deterministic event label that maps to a state transition. MUST be purely descriptive and MUST NOT encode policy, authorization logic, or external decisioning rules.
